title: Copy 20Of 20Official 20Notice 20Of 20Accommodations 20  20Template 20  20Lca
content:
NOTICE OF ACCOMMODATIONS
English: Interpretation, translation, and disability
accommodation services are available to you at no cost. If you need them, please contact us
at (Departments Point of Contact Email) or (phone number) by:(Date: two weeks in advance)
Spanish - Español: Hay servicios de interpretación, traducción y adaptaciones para discapacidades a su
disposición sin costo alguno. Si los necesita, por favor póngase en contacto con nosotros mandando un correo
electrónico a (Departments Point of Contact Email) o llamando a (phone number), hasta esta fecha: (Date: two
weeks in advance)
Haitian Creole -Kreyòl ayisyen: Sèvis entèpretasyon, tradiksyon, ak sèvis akomodasyon pou andikap
disponib pou ou gratis. Si w bezwen sèvis sa yo, tanpri kontakte nou nan (Departments Point of Contact Email)
oswa (phone number), avan: (Date: two weeks in advance)
Traditional Chinese - 繁體中文: 我們可以為您提供免費的口譯, 筆譯, 和殘疾人士合理照顧服務。如有需要，請在
(Date two weeks in advance) XX 月 YY 日, 前與我們連絡，發電子郵件至 (Departments Point of Contact Email) 或
致電 (phone number)
Vietnamese - Tiếng Việt: Các dịch vụ thông dịch, dịch thuật và hỗ trợ người khuyết tật được cung cấp miễn
phí cho bạn. Nếu bạn cần họ, vui lòng liên lạc với chúng tôi theo địa chỉ (Departments Point of Contact Email)
hoặc (phone number) trước ngày: (Date: two weeks in advance)
Simplified Chinese - 简体中文: 我们可以为您提供免费的口译, 笔译, 和残疾人士合理照顾服务。如有需要，请在
(Date two weeks in advance)XX 月 YY 日 前与我们联系, 发电子邮件至(Departments Point of Contact Email) 或致
电 (phone number)
Cabo Verdean Creole - kriolu: Nu ta oferese-bu sirvisus di interpretason, traduson y sirvisus di komodason
pa gentis ku difisénsia di grasa. Si bu meste kes sirvisu la, kontata-nu pa email (Departments Point of Contact
Email) ó pa telefóni, pa númeru (phone number). Na es data:(Date: two weeks in advance)
ﺔﯾﺑرﻌﻟا - Arabic
ﻰﻠﻋ ﺎﻧﻌﻣ لﺻاوﺗﻟا ﻰﺟرﯾ ،تﺎﻣدﺧﻟا هذﮭﻟ تﺟﺗﺣا اذإ .ﺔﻔﻠﻛﺗ يأ كﻠﻣﺣﺗ نود كﻟ ةرﻓوﺗﻣ ﺔﻗﺎﻋﻹا يوذﻟ تﻼﯾﮭﺳﺗﻟاو ﺔﯾرﯾرﺣﺗﻟاو ﺔﯾوﻔﺷﻟا ﺔﻣﺟرﺗﻟا تﺎﻣدﺧ
. (Date) موﯾ لوﻠﺣﺑ (phone number) فﺗﺎﮭﻟا مﻗر ﻰﻠﻋ وأ ،(Departments Point of Contact Email) ﻲﻧورﺗﻛﻟﻷا دﯾرﺑﻟا
Russian -Русский: Услуги устного и письменного перевода и по приспособлению инвалидов
предоставляются бесплатно. Если Вам они нужны, просьба связаться с нами по адресу электронной
почты (Departments Point of Contact Email) LCA@boston.gov либо по телефону (phone number) до (Date:
two weeks in advance)
Portuguese - Português: Disponibilizamos serviços de tradução e interpretação e adaptações especiais
para pessoas com deficiências gratuitamente. Para solicitar, envie e-mail para (Departments Point of Contact
Email) ou ligue para (phone number) até o dia (date:two weeks in advance)

NOTICE OF ACCOMMODATIONS
French - Français: Les services d'interprétation, de traduction et d'adaptation aux personnes handicapées
sont à votre disposition gratuitement. Si vous en avez besoin, veuillez nous contacter à (Departments Point of
Contact Email) , ou au (phone number), avant le: (Date: two weeks in advance)
Somali - Af Soomaali: Adeegyada tarjumaadda luuqadaha iyo hoyga naafada ayaa diyaar kuu ah adiga oo aan
wax kharash ah ka bixin. Haddii aad u baahatid iyaga, fadlan nagala soo xiriir (Departments Point of Contact
Email) ama (phone number) markay taariikhdu tahay: (Date: two weeks in advance)
